name: Turret Defend Apocalypse
description: Turret Defend Apocalypse is a fast-paced defense game set in a world overrun by chaos. Place, merge, and upgrade powerful turrets to stop endless waves of enemies before they break through your last line of defense. Web Dev https://www.loogames.com/ Combining identical turrets creates stronger, deadlier versions with unique effects and increased firepower. As the apocalypse intensifies, enemies grow faster and tougher, pushing your strategy to the limit. Simple controls, satisfying merges, and nonstop action make every run intense
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
